# PollPulse — Backend Blueprint

**Stack:** Bun + Elysia.js + Drizzle ORM + PostgreSQL  
**Deployment:** Render.com (Web Service + managed PostgreSQL + Cron Job)  
**Generated by:** Backend Integrator Agent v4.3

---

## 1. Architecture Overview

PollPulse is a real-time polling platform built on **Bun** runtime with **Elysia.js** framework. The architecture centers on a fast vote ingestion path, a real-time SSE results stream, and a clean RBAC system separating anonymous voters, authenticated users, and admins.

**Core design decisions:**
- **Bun runtime** — native TypeScript execution, fast startup, built-in test runner (`bun test`)
- **Elysia.js** — typed route schemas, `onAfterHandle` security headers hook, `derive()` for request context
- **Drizzle ORM** — type-safe PostgreSQL queries with migration runner
- **SSE for real-time** — one-way push (results updates) needs SSE, not full WebSocket
- **Vote deduplication** — DB-level UNIQUE constraint + Redis for hot-path duplicate checking
- **argon2id** — password hashing via `@node-rs/argon2` (Wasm — Bun-compatible)

---

## 2. Data Model

### Entity: User
```typescript
users {
  id:           uuid PK
  email:        text NOT NULL UNIQUE         -- PII: Confidential
  displayName:  text NOT NULL               -- PII: Confidential
  passwordHash: text NOT NULL
  role:         enum('user', 'admin') DEFAULT 'user'
  isActive:     boolean DEFAULT true
  createdAt:    timestamp
  updatedAt:    timestamp
}
```

### Entity: Poll
```typescript
polls {
  id:                 uuid PK
  userId:             uuid FK→users.id ON DELETE CASCADE
  title:              text NOT NULL
  description:        text
  slug:               text UNIQUE NOT NULL   -- public voting URL key
  isPublic:           boolean DEFAULT true
  allowMultiple:      boolean DEFAULT false  -- multiple choice
  showResultsAfterVote: boolean DEFAULT true
  status:             enum('draft', 'active', 'closed', 'expired') DEFAULT 'active'
  expiresAt:          timestamp
  totalVotes:         integer DEFAULT 0      -- denormalized counter
  createdAt:          timestamp
  updatedAt:          timestamp
}
```

### Entity: PollOption
```typescript
poll_options {
  id:          uuid PK
  pollId:      uuid FK→polls.id ON DELETE CASCADE
  label:       text NOT NULL
  voteCount:   integer DEFAULT 0            -- denormalized counter
  position:    integer NOT NULL             -- display order
  createdAt:   timestamp
}
```

### Entity: Vote
```typescript
votes {
  id:          uuid PK
  pollId:      uuid FK→polls.id ON DELETE CASCADE
  optionId:    uuid FK→poll_options.id ON DELETE CASCADE
  userId:      uuid FK→users.id ON DELETE SET NULL  -- null for anonymous
  ipHash:      text NOT NULL               -- SHA-256 of IP (not raw IP — privacy)
  createdAt:   timestamp
  UNIQUE(pollId, userId)    -- one vote per authenticated user per poll
  UNIQUE(pollId, ipHash)    -- one vote per IP per poll (for anonymous)
}
```

### Indexes
```sql
CREATE INDEX idx_polls_user_id    ON polls(user_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_polls_slug       ON polls(slug);
CREATE INDEX idx_poll_options_poll_id ON poll_options(poll_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_votes_poll_id    ON votes(poll_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_votes_user_id    ON votes(user_id);
```

---

## 3. API Endpoints

### Auth Module (`/api/auth`)
| Method | Route | Auth | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| POST | `/api/auth/register` | None | Register + return tokens |
| POST | `/api/auth/login` | None | Login + return tokens |
| POST | `/api/auth/logout` | Bearer | Invalidate refresh token |
| POST | `/api/auth/refresh` | Cookie | Rotate refresh token |
| GET | `/api/auth/me` | Bearer | Current user profile |

### Polls Module (`/api/polls`)
| Method | Route | Auth | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| GET | `/api/polls/my` | Bearer | Paginated list of user's polls |
| POST | `/api/polls` | Bearer | Create poll + options |
| GET | `/api/polls/:id` | Bearer | Get poll by ID (owner only) |
| PATCH | `/api/polls/:id` | Bearer (owner) | Update poll metadata |
| DELETE | `/api/polls/:id` | Bearer (owner) | Delete poll + cascade |
| PATCH | `/api/polls/:id/close` | Bearer (owner) | Close poll early |
| GET | `/api/polls/:id/results` | Bearer (owner) | Full results with vote breakdown |
| GET | `/api/polls/:id/stream` | Bearer (owner) | SSE stream of live result updates |

### Public Voting Module (`/api/public`)
| Method | Route | Auth | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| GET | `/api/public/polls/:slug` | None | Get poll for voting (title, options, status) |
| POST | `/api/public/polls/:id/vote` | Optional | Submit vote (anonymous or authenticated) |

### Admin Module (`/api/admin`)
| Method | Route | Auth | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| GET | `/api/admin/users` | Bearer (admin) | Paginated user list |
| PATCH | `/api/admin/users/:id/role` | Bearer (admin) | Change user role |
| PATCH | `/api/admin/users/:id/suspend` | Bearer (admin) | Suspend/unsuspend user |
| DELETE | `/api/admin/users/:id` | Bearer (admin) | Delete user + cascade |
| GET | `/api/admin/polls` | Bearer (admin) | All polls (moderation view) |
| DELETE | `/api/admin/polls/:id` | Bearer (admin) | Remove poll (moderation) |

### Health Module
| Method | Route | Auth | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| GET | `/health/live` | None | Liveness probe — returns 200 immediately |
| GET | `/health/ready` | None | Readiness probe — DB ping + cache check |

**Total: 21 endpoints**

---

## 4. Vote Deduplication Strategy

Votes are deduplicated at two levels:

**Level 1 — DB UNIQUE constraint (authoritative):**
- `UNIQUE(poll_id, user_id)` for authenticated users
- `UNIQUE(poll_id, ip_hash)` for anonymous voters (SHA-256 of `X-Forwarded-For`, not raw IP)

**Level 2 — Redis hot-path check (performance):**
- Before DB insert: `EXISTS vote:{pollId}:{userId|ipHash}`
- Cache TTL: 24 hours
- Returns 409 Conflict if duplicate detected without hitting DB

**Privacy:** Raw IP addresses are never stored. Only `SHA-256(ip)` is stored in `votes.ipHash`. This satisfies GDPR Article 5(c) data minimization.

---

## 5. Real-Time Results (SSE)

Server-Sent Events stream live vote counts to the poll owner's results page.

```
GET /api/polls/:id/stream
Authorization: Bearer <token>
Accept: text/event-stream
```

**SSE flow:**
1. Client opens connection → server sends current state immediately
2. When a vote is cast on this poll → DB trigger or poll broadcast → push update event
3. Client receives: `data: {"optionId":"...","voteCount":42,"totalVotes":150}`
4. Connection auto-closes when poll expires or is closed

**Implementation:** Each SSE connection registers in a `Map<pollId, Set<ReadableStreamController>>`. Vote write path pushes to all registered controllers for that pollId.

```typescript
// In-memory broadcast registry (per Worker instance)
const sseClients = new Map<string, Set<ReadableStreamDefaultController>>()
```

**Note:** This is single-instance SSE. For multi-instance Render deployments, use Render's sticky sessions or Redis pub/sub for cross-instance broadcast. v1 assumes single-instance.

---

## 6. Security Implementation

### Authentication
- Access token: JWT (HS256, 15min), signed with `JWT_SECRET` (min 32 chars)
- Refresh token: opaque random string (64 bytes), hashed with SHA-256, stored in `refresh_tokens` table
- Both tokens set as `httpOnly`, `Secure`, `SameSite=Strict` cookies

### Rate Limiting (Elysia + Redis)
```
Auth routes:          10 req / 60s per IP (argon2 is CPU-intensive — strict limit)
Vote endpoint:        30 req / 60s per IP (ballot stuffing prevention)
Admin routes:         100 req / 60s per IP (lower traffic, less strict)
Global API:           200 req / 60s per IP
```

### Security Headers (Elysia `onAfterHandle` hook)
```typescript
app.onAfterHandle(({ response, set }) => {
  set.headers['X-Content-Type-Options'] = 'nosniff'
  set.headers['X-Frame-Options'] = 'DENY'
  set.headers['X-XSS-Protection'] = '1; mode=block'
  set.headers['Referrer-Policy'] = 'strict-origin-when-cross-origin'
  set.headers['Permissions-Policy'] = 'camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()'
  set.headers['Content-Security-Policy'] = "default-src 'self'"
})
```

### CORS
```typescript
app.use(cors({
  origin: (origin) => CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS.split(',').includes(origin),
  credentials: true,
  allowedHeaders: ['Content-Type', 'Authorization'],
}))
```

### Input Validation
Elysia's `t.Object()` schema validation on all route bodies — invalid payloads rejected at the route handler boundary before business logic.

---

## 7. Observability

### Structured Logging
```typescript
// src/lib/logger.ts
export function log(level: 'info' | 'warn' | 'error', event: string, meta: Record<string, unknown>) {
  console.log(JSON.stringify({
    level,
    event,
    timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
    ...meta,
  }))
}
```

### Request ID Middleware
```typescript
app.derive(({ request }) => ({
  requestId: request.headers.get('X-Request-Id') ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
}))
```

### Metrics Logged Per Request
- `requestId`, `method`, `path`, `statusCode`, `durationMs`, `userId` (if authenticated)

---

## 8. Background Jobs (Cron)

### Poll Expiry Cleanup (Daily)
Deployed as a Render **Cron Job** service — separate from the API service.

```typescript
// cron/expire-polls.ts
// Runs: 0 2 * * * (daily at 2am UTC)
// Sets status='expired' on polls where expiresAt < NOW() AND status='active'
// Cleans up draft polls older than 30 days with zero votes
```

---

## 9. Playbooks Applied

| Playbook | Application |
|---|---|
| `auth.md` | JWT + refresh token rotation, argon2id, httpOnly cookies |
| `rate-limiting.md` | Sliding window per-IP for auth + vote endpoints |
| `security.md` | Security headers hook, CORS allowlist, IP hash for vote deduplication |
| `observability.md` | Structured JSON logging, request ID middleware, `/health/live` + `/health/ready` |
| `realtime.md` | SSE results stream for poll owner live view |
| `gdpr-data-export.md` | IP not stored (only SHA-256 hash), email PII classification, data minimization |
